description: One-instance-per-benchmark smoke run for validating Verified, Pro, Poly, and Multi resolution support with the Superpowers 5 setup.

variants.name: baseline
variants.description: Run Codex without any Superpowers resources mounted into the isolated runtime.
variants.notes: Explicit control variant. Uses the same model, reasoning effort, and timeout as the base run, with no additional runtime resources.

variants.name: with-superpowers-mounted
variants.description: Mount a vendored Superpowers snapshot into the isolated Codex runtime before the scored benchmark task.
variants.notes: Seeds the isolated Codex runtime with a vendored Superpowers snapshot by copying the full snapshot to ~/.codex/superpowers and exposing its skills through ~/.agents/skills/superpowers.

setup.prompt_preamble: Superpowers resources are mounted in this runtime and should be used when relevant, including planning, test-first thinking, and verification discipline. However, this is still a ContextBench benchmark task, not an open-ended workflow exercise. Do not stop at planning or process-only outputs.
